assertions.description: filterbank.sch contains 3 inductors (L?) and 4 capacitors (C?), all unannotated with '?' suffix. The statistics.total_components reports 2 and unique_parts reports 2, collapsing all instances down to one per reference stem. The components array correctly lists all 7 entries, creating an internal inconsistency. The BOM also shows quantity=1 for L and quantity=1 for C instead of the actual counts. This is a de-duplication bug where unannotated references sharing the same stem (e.g., all 'L?') are merged rather than counted individually.
